description: Dry-run fixture — no-op stories that mutate TARGET.md only. Used to exercise the Crow Memory persistence flow.

userStories.title: Append LINE-A to TARGET.md marker block
userStories.description: Between the <!-- MARKER-START --> and <!-- MARKER-END --> lines in TARGET.md, append a new line: LINE-A.
acceptanceCriteria: TARGET.md contains the literal string 'LINE-A' inside the marker block
Marker block delimiters remain intact and in order

userStories.title: Append LINE-B after LINE-A in TARGET.md
userStories.description: After the LINE-A line inserted by US-001, append a new line: LINE-B. Both must remain inside the marker block.
acceptanceCriteria: TARGET.md contains 'LINE-A' followed by 'LINE-B' inside the marker block

userStories.title: Replace marker block timestamp line
userStories.description: Add or update a line inside the marker block of the form: TIMESTAMP: <ISO-8601 UTC>.
acceptanceCriteria: Marker block contains exactly one TIMESTAMP: line with a valid ISO-8601 UTC value
LINE-A and LINE-B from prior stories are preserved
